text.content: 2026-05-10: Elevated to sprint item. Phantom delegation_fail alerts firing repeatedly (3,761 entries, all empty task/agent/error). Fix: exclude empty-field entries from delegation_fail check in obs-collector. | COMPLETE 2026-05-10. Two fixes in obs-collector.sh: (1) delegation_fail phantom guard: skip entries where task+agent+error all empty (latency tracking records, not real failures). (2) CHECK Q cron_run_fail deduplication: added lastRunEpoch check to prevent re-logging same cron failures on every 5-min collector run. Test: 3761 phantom entries -> 0 logged. Collector run: 0 new events (correct). CHG-0266.

(2) CHECK Q cron_run_fail deduplication: added lastRunEpoch check to prevent re-logging same cron failures on every 5-min collector run. Test: 3761 phantom entries -> 0 logged.
